_comment: Crave Plivo reference business facts — code-owned config seeded into SessionState.known_facts. These are STATIC domain facts (catalog, hours, sizes, menu prices), NOT per-case label leakage: grounding a real menu price is correct production behavior. Loaded by eval.py --facts and by Firewall(known_facts=...). DELIBERATELY ABSENT: dynamic per-call values (a specific order id like 4471, a computed cart total like $24) — the offline harness cannot synthesize those the way the runtime writes tool results / computed totals into state, so the golden FPs that depend on them (legit_orderid_01, readback_total_01) are expected to PERSIST and are reported honestly, not hidden.
menu_items: Margherita, Pepperoni, Mushroom, BBQ Chicken, Veggie Supreme
refund_policy: agents cannot process refunds directly; transfer to a specialist
gluten_free: availability must be checked, never promised upfront
